Introducing the Pro Rig Scanner

Free Windows app that detects your hardware and recommends upgrades in your budget. Runs 100% locally on your PC — we don't store or collect any of your data. Download, scan, upgrade — three steps, thirty seconds.

Free, under 2 MB

Browse & Compare
Search across retailers. See real-time prices from Amazon, Newegg, B&H, and Best Buy.

Check Compatibility
18+ automatic checks — socket matching, GPU clearance, PSU wattage, RAM type, and more.
03
Build & Save
Find the best price, apply coupon codes, and buy through affiliate links at no extra cost.
